leadText: Heatproof (Japanese: たいねつ Heatproof) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV. Prior to Generation VIII, it was the signature Ability of Bronzor and Bronzong.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If a Pokémon with Heatproof is attacked by a Fire-type move, the opponent's Attack or Special Attack is reduced by 50% during damage calculation, effectively halving the damage the Pokémon takes. Prior to Generation IX , the power of affected moves is reduced by 50% instead. It also halves the damage done from the burn status ailment, from 1⁄16 to 1⁄32 of the Pokémon's maximum HP (from 1⁄8 to 1⁄16 of the Pokémon's maximum HP prior to Generation VII ). Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Heatproof has no effect outside of battle.

sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Halves the damage the Pokémon suffers from Fire-type attacks. B S L ほのおタイプの ダメージを はんげんする MD GtI Unavailable S MD The Pokémon takes less damage from Fire-type moves!
